steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice emphasizes how long swimming has been a Paralympic event. The key note is: "Swimming has been an event at the Paralympics since 1960." The correct choice must foreground that 1960 date.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — An accomplished Paralympian with multiple gold medal wins, Béatrice Hess competed as a swimmer from 1984 to 2004.: Emphasizes Hess's career span, not the sport's history. ✗
  • Choice B — Béatrice Hess competed at the Paralympic Games, a series of international sporting events.: Defines the Paralympics but says nothing about how long swimming has been included. ✗
  • Choice C — Swimming, a sport in which Béatrice Hess took home twenty gold medals, has been an event at the Paralympic Games since 1960.: Directly states swimming has been a Paralympic event since 1960, which is exactly the emphasis the question requires. ✓
  • Choice D — During her career in swimming, which started in 1984, Béatrice Hess took home a total of twenty-five medals, twenty of which were gold.: Emphasizes Hess's medal count; 1984 is when Hess started competing, not when swimming joined the Paralympics. ✗
That matches Choice C — Swimming, a sport in which Béatrice Hess took home twenty gold medals, has been an event at the Paralympic Games since 1960..
